title: T-070 — true 8-h absolute session lifetime + session_started_at (FT-010)
prompt:
# T-070 — true 8-h absolute session lifetime + session_started_at (FT-010)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5.x, §13
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-010** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P1** (M effort)

## Goal
Add session_started_at column + session-check logic that enforces an absolute 8-h lifetime regardless of activity.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration 028 adds `auth_sessions.session_started_at timestamptz not null default now()`.
2. session-check.ts reads session_started_at on every refresh; if now() - session_started_at > 8h, calls revokeSession and returns 401.
3. Org override: read `tenant_idp_config.session_max_h` if present and cap at the cluster-wide hard ceiling.
4. Tests: (a) fresh session refreshes succeed; (b) session_started_at = now() - 7h59m succeeds; (c) session_started_at = now() - 8h01m returns 401.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/028-session-started-at.sql [create]
- packages/auth/src/session-check.ts [modify]
- packages/auth/src/__tests__/session-absolute-lifetime.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 028 applied, when an auth_sessions row is created, then session_started_at is populated.
2. Given a session whose session_started_at is older than 8 hours, when refresh runs, then the call returns 401 and the session is revoked in Supabase.
3. Given an org override session_max_h=4, when a 5-hour-old session refreshes, then it returns 401 (the lower cap wins).
4. Given an org override session_max_h=24, when a 9-hour-old session refreshes, then it returns 401 (cluster ceiling of 8h wins).

## Test strategy
- RED: write session-absolute-lifetime.test.ts asserting all four ACs before implementation.
- Mock Supabase admin client via vi.fn().
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/auth test session-absolute-lifetime`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not couple absolute-lifetime check to idle-timeout check.
- Do not skip the cluster-wide ceiling when honoring org overrides.
- Do not log session_started_at as a session secret.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement PRD §5.x absolute 8-h session max (separate from idle timeout) by tracking session_started_at and rejecting tokens older than 8h regardless of activity.
pipeline_inputs.details: Today session-check.ts enforces only idle_timeout (60min). PRD §5.x requires an absolute 8h cap. Add `session_started_at` (set at login) and reject any refresh whose now()-session_started_at > 8h.
out_of_scope: Do not change idle-timeout logic here.
Do not add new RBAC roles.
